Oracc: HBTIN — Hellenistic Babylonia: Texts, Iconography, Names

OECT 09, 46 [Sale of shares in erib bit piristuti and goldsmith's prebends][via hbtin]

Obverse
o 1o 1

[...] x ša₂ m⸢ni-din⸣-tu₄-⸢d60⸣ [...]

(o 1) [... son] of Nidintu-Anu [...]

o 22

[x x] ⸢x⸣ [...] ⸢x x x x x⸣ [...]

o 33

[x]-⸢ʾu⸣-u₂ ⸢ina⸣ [GIŠ].⸢ŠUB⸣.BA lu₂⸢KU₄ E₂ pi⸣-[riš-tu₄u₂-tu ...]

(o 3) [...] in the prebend of the enterer of the "house of secrets" [...] Ištar and Nanaya and all the gods of their temples [...] and one-foruth of one-sixtieth of the prebend of the enterer of the "house of secrets" and the goldsmith's prebend of Antu, Papsukkal and Belet-ṣēri, [Šarahitu and] all of the the [gods] of their temples in the sheep of the hitpu sacrifices of all the clothing ceremonies, and in the cooked and raw mutton [...] that are offered on the table of Ellil in the eššeššu offerings; in the beef, mutton, fowl and lambs and or the hulled barley on the seventeenth day of Tašritu that go up to the table of Papsukkal [...] of hulled barley that is offered up on the table of Antu on the eighth day; in the linen of the altar-bases, curtains and baldachins —— and if silver instead of that linen [...] juniper, wine, combed wool [...] combed wool of the thrones [...] the enterers of the "house of secrets [...] that are with his brothers [...] he will give [in] perpetuity. label+ r 2' - r 5' Nidintu-[Anu ...] Illut-Anu, son of Dannat-Belti bear [responsibility for clearing claims against] that prebend. label+ r 5' - r 6' That prebend belongs to Labaši son of [...] descendant of Ahʾutu in perpetuity.

o 44

[d]⸢INANA⸣ u d⸢na⸣-na-a u DINGIR-MEŠ E₂-šu₂-⸢nu gab-bi⸣ [...]

o 55

⸢u₃⸣ re-[bu]-⸢u₂⸣ ina 60ʾu-u₂ GIŠ.ŠUB.BA ⸢lu₂⸣[KU₄ E₂ pi-riš-tu₄u₂-tu₂ u₃]

o 66

⸢lu₂⸣KU₃.DIMu₂-⸢tu₂⸣ ša₂ an-⸢tu₄⸣ dPAP.SUKKAL u dGAŠAN—⸢EDIN⸣ [dšar-ra-ḫi-i-tu₄ u DINGIR-MEŠ]

o 77

⸢E₂⸣-šu₂-nu gab-bi ina UDU.NITA₂-MEŠ ša₂ ḫi-it-pi-MEŠ ša₂ tug₂[lu-bu-ša₂-a-tu₂]

o 88

⸢gab-bi⸣ <u₃> ⸢ina UZU⸣ ba-aš₂-lu u₃ UZU bal-ṭu ša₂ ⸢UDU⸣.[NITA₂ ...]

o 99

ša₂ ina ⸢U₄⸣.EŠ₃.EŠ₃-MEŠ a-na gišBANŠUR ša₂ dEN.LIL₂ E₁₁u₂ [ina UZU GU₄]

o 1010

⸢UDU.NITA₂ MUŠEN⸣ u₃ uduSILA₄ u₃ ša₂ ⸢qa⸣-ʾi-i-tu₄ ša₂ ⸢ina⸣ [U₄ 17-KAM₂]

o 1111

ša₂ ⸢itiDU₆⸣ a-na gišBANŠUR ša₂ dPAP.SUKKAL E₁₁u₂ [...]

o 1212

⸢x⸣ [x x x] ⸢x⸣ u₃ ša₂ qa-ʾi-i-tu₄ ša₂ ina U₄ 8-KAM₂ ša₂ iti[ŠE a-na]

o 1313

[giš]⸢BANŠUR⸣ ša₂ an-tu₄ E₁₁u₂ ina ⸢GADA⸣-[MEŠ ša₂ šu]-⸢bat⸣-MEŠ ⸢US₂-MEŠ⸣ [u ANe]

r 5'5'

⸢na⸣-šu-u₂ GIŠ.ŠUB.BA MU-MEŠ ša₂ mNU—TEŠ₂ DUMU ša₂ m⸢x⸣-[...]

r 6'6'

A mŠEŠ-ʾu-u₂-tu a-na u₄-mu ṣa-a-tu₂ šu-[u₂]

(witnesses)
r 7'7'

lu₂mu-kin₇ mtat-tan-nu DUMU ša₂ mdUTU—MU[nu ...]

(r 7') Witnesses: Tattannu, son of Šamaš-ittannu [...]

r 8'8'

mšib-qat₂—d60 DUMU ša₂ mKAR—d60 A mE₂.KUR—za-kir m[...]

(r 8') Šibqat-Anu, son of Mušezib-Anu, descendant of Ekur-zakir. [...]

r 9'9'

A ša₂ mGAL-ka—d60 A mŠEŠ-ʾu-u₂-tu mNU—TEŠ₂ DUMU ša₂ md60—ŠEŠ-[...]

(r 9') son of Rabutika-Anu, descendant of Ahʾutu. Labaši, son of Anu-ah-x[...]

r 10'10'

md60—NUMUN—MU DUMU ša₂ mni-din-tu₄—d60 A mŠEŠ-ʾu-u₂-tu mNIG₂.SUM.⸢MU⸣-[d60 DUMU ša₂ x]

(r 10') Anu-zer-iddin, son of Nidintu-Anu, descendant of Ahʾutu. Nidintu-Anu [...]

r 11'11'

A mŠEŠ-ʾu-u₂-⸢tu⸣ md60—DINiṭ DUMU ša₂ mBARA₂—d60 A m⸢ḫun-zu⸣-[u₂ ...]

(r 11') descendant of Ahʾutu. Anu-uballiṭ, son of Kidin-Anu, descendant of Hunzu

(colophon)
r 12'12'

md<60>-ŠEŠ-MEŠ—MU lu₂UMBISAG DUMU ša₂ md60—EN-[šu₂-nu A x UNUGki]

(r 12') Anu-ahhe-iddin, scribe, son of Anu-bel[šunu, descendant of ... Uruk.] Ululu. 21st day. 111th year, [Antiochus and Antiochus (were) kings.]

r 13'13'

⸢iti⸣KIN <<KAM₂>> U₄ 21-KAM₂ MU ⸢111⸣-[KAM₂ man-ti-ʾi-i-ku-su u man-ti-ʾi-i-ku-su LUGAL-MEŠ]
